citation: Huang, Yu-Hsin, One-Soon Her, and Stano Kong. 2025. Revisiting the Taxonomy of Interrogatives in Cantonese. Tsing Hua Journal of Chinese Studies 55(1):157-195. DOI:10.6503/THJCS.202503_55(1).0005.
claim_supported: Explicit disjunctive linkers 定(係) and 抑或; alternative questions request selection rather than truth confirmation; incompatibility with polar 咩 in the authors' judgments; compatibility with 究竟, 話, 先 and embedded-question use; proposed grouping with A-not-A and wh questions as information-seeking questions.
limitations: The binary CS/IS taxonomy, LF intervention account, and particle analysis are theory-specific. Most judgments are author examples rather than a reported adult acceptability experiment. Negative boundaries require independent speaker and discourse replication before implementation.

citation: Li, Hui, Shek Kam Tse, Jessie Ming Sin Wong, Eileen Chin Mei Wong, and Shing On Leung. 2013. The development of interrogative forms and functions in early childhood Cantonese. First Language 33(2):168-181. DOI:10.1177/0142723713479422.
locator: https://doi.org/10.1177/0142723713479422; author-upload full text, pp. 169-172; study corpus and interrogative-form coding
claim_supported: Recognizes an alternative form offering a choice between two alternatives, formed by linking phrases with ding6 or ding6 hai6; documents the form in a corpus study of 492 Cantonese-speaking children aged 36, 48, and 60 months.
limitations: Child production and coding categories do not establish adult productivity, exact constituent boundaries, particle compatibility, or a correct syntactic analysis. The article follows an earlier question taxonomy rather than resolving the 2025 theoretical dispute.

citation: 鄭定歐、張勵妍、高石英. 2021. 粵語（香港話）教程（修訂版）. 香港: 三聯書店.
locator: Uploaded PDF printed p. 60; section （四）疑問詞「定係」; lesson examples on printed pp. 56-60
claim_supported: Defines 甲定係乙 as bounded choice and provides exact person, destination, time, manner, and activity alternatives; separately identifies 定係 as a question word meaning 'or'.
limitations: Pedagogical explanation and examples support attestation and learner-facing contrasts, not unrestricted productivity, frequency, universal judgments, or a parser node. The book's romanization is not imported.

citation: Canto Span Study Suite complete vocabulary and grammar coverage diagnostics, generated 2026-07-19.
locator: Diagnostics for 喺前面定係後面？ and 你飲茶定係飲咖啡？

limitations: Parser output and generated probes have zero independent linguistic evidence weight. This source is used only for collision mapping.
